auth.title: SubsTrack
auth.subtitle: Sign in to your workspace
auth.account_not_configured: Account not configured. Contact your administrator.

customers.title: Customers
customers.no_customers_hint: Tap "+ Add" to add your first customer
customers.deactivate_message: Are you sure you want to deactivate {{name}}? They will be marked as inactive.
customers.reactivate_message: Are you sure you want to reactivate {{name}}?

plans.title: Plans
plans.no_plans_hint: Tap "+ New Plan" to create one
plans.delete_message: Delete "{{name}}"? Customers assigned to this plan will have their plan removed.

users.title: Staff
users.no_staff_hint: Tap "+ Add Staff" to create one

payments.void_reason_placeholder: Explain why this payment is being voided
payments.void_description: Voiding this payment will mark {{month}} {{year}} as unpaid. This action cannot be undone.
payments.void_confirm_message: This will mark {{month}} {{year}} as unpaid. The original payment will be retained in records.
payments.inactive_customer_future: Cannot record future payments for inactive customers
payments.before_start_date: This month is before the customer's start date. No payment can be recorded here.
payments.inactive_future_blocked: This customer is inactive. Future month payments cannot be recorded for inactive customers.

admin.title: Admin
admin.tenant_code_hint: Lowercase letters and numbers only, no spaces

settings.title: Settings
settings.restart_notice: The app will restart to apply the new language.
settings.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

tenant_inactive.title: Organization Deactivated
tenant_inactive.message: Your organization's account has been deactivated. Please contact the service owner to resolve this.
tenant_inactive.contact_hint: If you believe this is a mistake, reach out to your SubsTrack administrator.
